title: dryopteris galanderi
intro: Dryopteris galanderi, also known as Galandr's male fern, is a species of flowering plant in the fern family Dryopteridaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to expel worms, particularly tapeworms, from the digestive system, and as a treatment for various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Dryopteris galanderi include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote overall well-being, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness. Herbal preparations of Dryopteris galanderi typically involve using the plant's fronds or roots to create infusions, decoctions, or tinctures that can be used to treat various health issues.
